_comment: State file for the master-orchestrator continuous loop. Updated in-place by the orchestrator on every iteration. Tracks iteration count, start time, 24-hour bound, target instance, and the last iteration's top-line outcome so cross-session runs have continuity.
started_at_note: FILLED BY FIRST ITERATION — orchestrator overwrites with real ISO timestamp on its first fire
_protocol: Every orchestrator iteration must: (1) read this file, (2) check wall-clock vs max_wall_clock_hours — if exceeded, call CronDelete on cron_job_id and exit, (3) check iteration_count vs max_iterations — same, (4) do one loop phase A/B/C/D, (5) update last_iteration + cumulative + iteration_count += 1, (6) save this file back atomically.
